div.p: UNINITIALIZED H[0..7] = garbage buf_len = undefined total_bits = undefined
INITIALIZED H[0..7] = SHA256_INITIAL_HASH buf_len = 0 total_bits = 0 Invariant: no partial block buffered
ACCUMULATING H[0..7] = running hash state buf_len ∈ [1, 63] total_bits = Σ(len×8) so far buf[0..buf_len-1] = valid bytes Invariant: buf never holds full block
BLOCK_BOUNDARY (transient — no external visibility) buf_len reached 64 → sha256_compress(H, buf) → buf_len reset to 0 Resolved within single update() call
FINALIZED digest[0..31] = valid SHA-256 output H[0..7] = final state (stale) buf = padding + length field (stale) ctx is indeterminate — must re-init
ILLEGAL USE Second hash starts from first hash's H[0..7] output state Silent wrong digest — no error, no crash Root cause of production HMAC bugs

text.tspan: Second hash inherits H from first
